name: OpenClaw AI Video Editor
description: AI video editor for natural-language edits, viral clips, captions, vertical video, chroma key, audio cleanup, and MP4 export through the Livecore/OpenClaw API.

apiUrl.label: Livecore API Base URL
apiUrl.help: Use https://api.livecore.ai or a full /api/v1/misc/openclaw/v1/execute endpoint.

apiKey.label: Livecore API Key
apiKey.help: Create an API key at https://studio.livecore.ai/.
